programmes.show_description: This is BBC Radio 5 Sports Extra - bringing you even more live commentaries from the world's greatest sporting events. Listen on BBC Sounds.

Kevin Howells presents live ball-by-ball cricket commentary from the County Championship.
Live rugby union commentary from BBC Radio Leicester of Bordeaux Bègles v Leicester Tigers in the last 16 of the European Champions Cup.

Live boxing commentary of Caroline Dubois v Terri Harper, plus undercard bouts including Chantelle Cameron v Michaela Kotaskova and Ellie Scotney v Mayelli Flores. Contains some strong language.
